name: Zinc band-pass sensor (healthy-window)
shortDescription: Fires only when zinc sits within a target concentration window — not too low, not too high — using an incoherent feed-forward loop. Useful for flagging deviations from a healthy/optimal range rather than mere presence.

input.detects: Zinc within a defined concentration window
input.operatingRange: Tunable pass-band (e.g. ~1-50 µM) set by the two thresholds

sensing.sensorMechanism: Two zinc-responsive elements with different thresholds: a low-threshold ZntR activator turns the reporter ON; a high-threshold arm drives a CRISPRi sgRNA that turns it back OFF.
sensing.signalFlow: Low zinc -> reporter OFF (below low threshold). Mid zinc -> ZntR ON, high arm not yet active -> reporter ON (in band). High zinc -> CRISPRi sgRNA represses the reporter -> OFF (above high threshold). Net: ON only inside the window (incoherent feed-forward loop).

parts.name: ZntR + PzntA (low-threshold ON arm)
parts.notes: Turns the reporter on above the low threshold.

parts.name: High-threshold zinc element -> sgRNA
parts.source: second zinc-responsive promoter with a higher set-point
parts.notes: Drives the CRISPRi sgRNA above the high threshold.

output.result: Fluorescence peaks within the zinc window and falls off outside it.

performance.notes: Band-pass / incoherent feed-forward circuits are validated as a topology (Basu et al. 2005); this zinc-windowed CRISPRi version is a design template. Tune the two thresholds via promoter/operator strength.

safety.biocontainment: Lab/contained; add kill-switch for field use.
safety.notes: E. coli K-12 non-pathogenic BSL-1 host.

buildSteps.title: Set the two thresholds
buildSteps.description: Tune the low (ON) and high (OFF) zinc set-points via operator affinity; design the sgRNA.

buildSteps.title: Assemble the feed-forward loop
buildSteps.description: ON arm: ZntR -> reporter. OFF arm: high-threshold zinc promoter -> sgRNA + dCas9 -> represses reporter.

buildSteps.title: Transform E. coli K-12
buildSteps.description: Select; characterise the dose-response to confirm a band-pass shape.

buildSteps.title: Zinc titration
buildSteps.description: Run a full zinc dose-response to map the pass-band.

buildSteps.title: Read window
buildSteps.description: Signal present only within the target window.

provenance.source: Design template: a zinc band-pass sensor (incoherent feed-forward loop) with a CRISPRi high-threshold arm
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
